description.value:
Category: Taijutsu

Prerequisite: Iron Fist Stance, Level 4+

You have trained under the teachings of the Masters of brawling and metal bending fists, gaining the following benefits:

• Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

• While you are in the Iron Fist Stance, your [Unarmed Damage] die becomes a d8.

If you have Combat Bracers this instead becomes 1d10 if Strength is your Taijutsu ability score.

• Taijutsu you know that requires the Iron Fist Stance to be cast, and up to two additional Taijutsu that you know, that requires you to make no more than two taijutsu attacks become Iron Fist Taijutsu.

Iron Fist Taijutsu you cast gain the Metal trait.

- Metal.

Once per casting, when dealing damage to a creature with Armor based DR (Damage reduction), you can punch through their Armor.

By spending your Bonus action as part of the jutsu's casting, you can reduce their Armor based DR by an amount equal to the result of one of your [Unarmed Damage] die.

This Armor reduction lasts until the affected creature spends an Action adjusting themselves.
